[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style illustration focuses on a young person’s face, framed tightly by light-colored hair and a portion of a hand near their chin.

The main subject is a stylized character with short, layered light gray or lavender hair and large dark eyes with bright highlights. The character’s face is shown from the front-left angle, with one eye more prominent. Their mouth is closed, with a small, neutral expression and faint blush tones on the cheeks. A hand with visible fingers is raised near the bottom-right of the image, partially covering the chin area, while the other side of the face remains unobstructed.

The setting is not clearly identifiable because the image appears to be a cropped illustration with a plain, soft background of similar tones. Lighting is even and smooth, typical of anime artwork, with subtle shading along the hair and under the eyes. Thin line details and smooth gradients emphasize the eye highlights and facial contours.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a tight, anime-style portrait of a character with large eyes, light-colored hair, and a neutral expression. The character’s raised hand is near their chin in the foreground.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the provided screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- [No text available to extract]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to be an illustration/graphic with no visible words, UI elements, or captions.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
